data.body: Completion-verifier evidence (42 closes post-ADR-0043): only ONE operator-attested FAIL (5f39 AC3) and it was RIGHTLY failed (Jira admin creds genuinely operator-held); admissibility bar fine (aa5a/7226 accepted comment evidence first try). Dominant pain = contagion: one unattestable AC -> 2 unsigned force-closes (5f39 + epic bf50, 19/19 landed), already bug 02a3. Aggravators: epic ACs demanding 'children closed (signed)' defeat certifiable:false; FAILs ratchet piecemeal (3b4e, 2 rounds -> 2 extra CI cycles); 1 stale-checkout false positive (003d); FAIL verdicts persist nowhere (empty run_snapshots) = calibration blind spot. Codebase-verifiable FAIL precision ~83% (5/6 real).
